methods.name: orb_slam3
methods.notes: Primary classical baseline with mono and mono-inertial EuRoC support.

methods.name: svo
methods.notes: Semi-direct odometry baseline using the SVO Pro Open repository.

methods.name: depth_anything_3
methods.notes: Dense geometry baseline with streaming submodule in upstream repo. Consider sharing the GPU torch stack with other Python reconstruction methods if dependencies remain compatible.

methods.name: litevggt
methods.notes: Use the official VGGT codebase with lighter checkpoints or reduced settings suitable for a 12 GB GPU. Prefer a shared GPU torch base if practical.

methods.name: map_anything
methods.notes: Metric 3D reconstruction framework. Prefer a shared GPU torch base if practical.

methods.name: stac_3r
methods.notes: Official project page: https://stac-3r.github.io/ . Upstream repository is Rainzor/STAC. The upstream README says it was tested on RTX 3090 24 GB and A100 40 GB, so this machine may need conservative settings.
